name: hostly-local
title: Hostly Local
description: Show Hostly profiles and quickly enable/disable hosts
author: local

commands.name: hostly-core
commands.title: Hostly Core
commands.description: Show host list and quickly enable/disable

scripts.build: ray build -e dist -o dist && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('icon.png','dist/icon.png'); fs.copyFileSync('README.md','dist/README.md');"
